ideation: This sequence depicts a supervillain's menacing pose, starting with arms crossed and ending with a hand raised in a dramatic gesture.  The left arm will begin crossed over the chest, while the right arm will dramatically rise to emphasize the villain's power.  The movement will be deliberate and slow, emphasizing the character's arrogance and menace. Frame 1 shows both arms crossed, with a slight inward tilt to suggest a threatening posture. Frame 2 shows the right arm beginning to rise, while the left arm remains in place, creating tension. Frame 3 shows the right arm fully raised, with the palm open in a commanding gesture. Frame 4 shows both arms returning to a more relaxed, yet still menacing, position, suggesting the villain's confidence in their power.  The left arm is slightly lower than the right, maintaining the threatening posture.

frames.beat: arms crossed, a menacing stance begins
the right arm rises, a threat taking shape
the right hand commands, palm open and wide
both arms settle, power held in reserve
